scripts.auth: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then node --env-file=.env.local server/auth-server.mjs; elif [ -f ../../../.env ]; then node --env-file=../../../.env server/auth-server.mjs; else node server/auth-server.mjs; fi'
scripts.build:hosted: npm run inventory && npx expo export --platform web --output-dir dist && cp public/project-inventory.json dist/project-inventory.json
scripts.native:dev: npm run inventory && npx expo start --host lan
scripts.native:ios: npm run inventory && npx expo start --ios
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n auth,web "npm run auth" "npm run web -- --port 8082"
scripts.web: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then node --env-file=.env.local ./node_modules/expo/bin/cli start --web "$@"; elif [ -f ../../../.env ]; then node --env-file=../../../.env ./node_modules/expo/bin/cli start --web "$@"; else expo start --web "$@"; fi' --
